message.content:
{
  "competency_groups": [
    {
      "code": "PH-XII-U7-C1",
      "title": "Dual Nature of Radiation and Matter",
      "description": "Understanding the photoelectric effect and wave-particle duality.",
      "competencies": [
        "Explain the experimental evidence for the particle nature of light through the photoelectric effect.",
        "Describe de Broglie's hypothesis regarding the wave nature of matter particles.",
        "Analyze the relationship between photon energy, frequency, and work function."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit–VII Dual Nature of Radiation and Matter",
      "chapter_name": "Dual Nature of Radiation and Matter"
    },
    {
      "code": "PH-XII-U8-C1",
      "title": "Atoms",
      "description": "Exploring atomic structure, models, and spectral series.",
      "competencies": [
        "Evaluate Rutherford's alpha-particle scattering experiment and its implications for nuclear model.",
        "Apply Bohr's postulates to explain the stability of atoms and hydrogen spectrum.",
        "Identify different spectral series (Lyman, Balmer, Paschen) derived from electron transitions."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit-VIII Atoms and Nuclei",
      "chapter_name": "Atoms"
    },
    {
      "code": "PH-XII-U8-C2",
      "title": "Nuclei",
      "description": "Investigating nuclear properties, binding energy, and reactions.",
      "competencies": [
        "Calculate mass defect and binding energy per nucleon to explain nuclear stability.",
        "Differentiate between nuclear fission and fusion processes with real-world examples.",
        "Analyze the characteristics of radioactive decay laws and half-life."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit-VIII Atoms and Nuclei",
      "chapter_name": "Nuclei"
    },
    {
      "code": "PH-XII-U9-C1",
      "title": "Materials, Devices and Simple Circuits",
      "description": "Studying semiconductor physics and electronic device applications.",
      "competencies": [
        "Distinguish between intrinsic and extrinsic semiconductors based on doping types.",
        "Explain the working principles of p-n junction diodes in rectification circuits.",
        "Design simple logic gate combinations using basic transistor switches."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit–IX Electronic Devices",
      "chapter_name": "Materials, Devices and Simple Circuits"
    }
  ]
}
